summary: Deterministic proof that local gate scripts are checked in, GitHub verify workflows invoke `npm run verify`, and the external consumer onboarding smoke exercises install, adapter init, minimal wiring, adapter resolve, doctor ready, and one bounded `evaluate fixture` run.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: local gates, GitHub verify workflows, and external consumer onboarding smoke
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the docs/master-plan.md claim about checked-in gates, verify workflows, and the external consumer onboarding smoke path is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Every CI workflow has been executed by GitHub for this commit.
`npm run verify` was run in this evidence slice.
The external consumer smoke proves product-runner assessment readiness.
Every real consumer repo can onboard without repo-specific adapter work.

protectedBehaviors: `.github/workflows/release-artifacts.yml` runs `npm run verify` before release artifact build steps.

The external consumer onboarding smoke test bootstraps a temporary repo through install, adapter init, minimal fixture/runner wiring, adapter resolve, doctor ready, and one bounded evaluate fixture run.

decision.reason: The new workflow/package-script test fixes the CI/local gate contract in checked-in tests, and the external consumer smoke exercises the first bounded onboarding path through install, adapter init, minimal wiring, adapter resolve, doctor ready, and evaluate fixture output packets.
